description.en: Use the IVI as a touchpad to drive the instrument cluster. Captures touch on the IVI, draws a cursor for visual feedback, and forwards taps + swipes onto a cluster display via the host's gesture-dispatch family. Reference for the Phase B native-capability surface.
description.ar: استخدم شاشة الوسائط كلوحة لمس للتحكم بشاشة العدادات.
